data.body: CLI-surface sweep landed (commit 82a48863). Plan-review PASS (re-run serially after a concurrent-operation HEAD flip transiently signed against main — root-caused to running review-plan/full-suite/subagents concurrently; now serialized). ~20 broad-excepts to floor: 15 justified-noqa (fail-open/re-raise-CommandError/fail-closed), 5 previously-silent except:pass swallows now logger.warning+noqa. All _cli/_commands prints kept (CLI presentation layer — usage/Error/exc.message + data output); no internal swallow-diagnostic prints existed to migrate. _cli removed from allowlist; _commands keeps T201. Code-review subagent: clean. make lint green; my tests pass in isolation (the full-suite run hit a separate pre-existing isolation flake where a concurrent op moved repo HEAD to main, failing the working-tree-reading convention tests as collateral — not a code defect).
